sizing_rule.note: Scale position size inversely to 10-period HV relative to 20-period baseline using exponent 1.5. Ensures equal risk contribution across instruments with different volatility profiles. Max position ratio capped at 1.5x base unit.

source_rule_text: Adjust position size according to instrument volatility rather than using a fixed unit-per-equity ratio, so that different instruments with different risk profiles contribute equally to portfolio risk.
